summary: Tested Unified Training System UI Sync in What's Needed tab. All features working correctly: training record info display, dropdown menu with training-specific actions, Edit Training Record dialog, Replace Certificate dialog, Delete Training Record dialog, View History dialog, Verify/Unverify training actions, and sync across tabs.

issues: Still shows 'Documents Pending' text in contact info area - should be 'Recruitment File: Incomplete' per requirements (carried over from iteration 38)

passed_tests: ✅ Training requirements in What's Needed tab show training record info (completion date, expiry, verification status)
✅ Training dropdown menu shows: Remove Verification, Edit Training Record, Replace Certificate, View History, Delete Training Record
✅ Edit Training Record from What's Needed opens the correction dialog with field selector, current/new value, and reason
✅ Replace Certificate from What's Needed opens the training certificate upload dialog
✅ Delete Training Record from What's Needed opens the delete confirmation dialog with soft-delete and audit trail
✅ View History from What's Needed opens the training record history dialog
✅ Verify Training (Mark as Approved) from What's Needed uses training-specific endpoint and shows success toast
✅ Unverify Training (Remove Verification) from What's Needed uses training-specific endpoint and syncs state
✅ Training tab reflects changes made from What's Needed tab (sync verification)
✅ Training Matrix reflects changes from What's Needed edits (sync verification)
✅ Training record info displays: Completed date, Verified by user, and status badges
✅ Core Training section shows correct approval count (6/6 approved after verify)
critical_code_review_comments: Unified training actions implemented correctly - What's Needed tab now uses same training record system as Training tab
Training-specific endpoints used for verify/unverify actions (handleVerifyTraining, handleUnverifyTraining)
openTrainingCorrectionFromWhatsNeeded and openDeleteTrainingFromWhatsNeeded functions properly build training record objects
Training record info (completion date, expiry, verification status) displayed correctly in What's Needed tab
All dialogs (Edit, Replace, Delete, History) open correctly from What's Needed dropdown menu
seed_data_creation: None - used existing employee data (Olakunle Alonge)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified Training System UI Sync verified. What's Needed tab now has full training record management: (1) Training record info displayed (completion date, expiry, verified status), (2) Dropdown menu with training-specific actions (Edit Record, Replace Cert, Delete Record, History, Verify/Unverify), (3) All actions use same backend endpoints as Training tab, (4) Changes sync across What's Needed tab, Training tab, and Training Matrix. Employee Olakunle Alonge has 6 training records all verified.
